events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: CSST gas line not bonded. This is a defect. NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal piping systems. CSST (corrugated stainless steel tubing) gas lines require bonding per 250.104(B) and manufacturer instructions. Not bonded = non-compliant, installed-defective. Risk is high (potential for arcing/ignition of gas). Decision: fail.
